arts.ttl: Newcastle 1-2 Fulham: Cottagers claim comeback win at St James' Park with strikes from Raul Jimenez and Rodrigo Muniz - as Magpies lose ground in Champions League race
arts.sum: CRAIG HOPE AT ST JAMES' PARK: Arsenal will be packing the sledgehammer after Fulham became the latest side to draw a blueprint for demolition.

arts.ttl: Valencia pair return to training ahead of Celta Vigo
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Valencia have on Friday been afforded a double boost on the personnel front. This comes amid confirmation that both Hugo Duro and Enzo Barrenechea have returned to…
